name: No-Fry French Fries
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon olive oil or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Line a jelly-roll pan with foil and generously coat with vegetable cooking spray.
3. Remove the skin from potatoes and pat them dry.
4. Cut each potato lengthwise into 1/2-inch-thick slices, then cut each slice crosswise into 1/2-inch-wide strips.
5. Toss the potato strips in a jelly-roll pan with oil, garlic, salt, and pepper until well coated.
6. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes, turning the strips once or twice with a metal spatula, until they are crisp and golden brown.
7. Serve immediately. Makes 4 servings.
For sweet potatoes: Peel 2 pounds of sweet potatoes and prepare as directed above. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, turning once.
